name: ujl-monorepo
description: Unified JSON Layout Framework - The Open-Source Web-Builder of the Future

scripts.instructions:sync: rm -rf .cursor/rules && mkdir -p .cursor/rules && if [ -d .agents/rules ]; then cp -r .agents/rules/. .cursor/rules/; else echo 'No .agents/rules to sync'; fi
scripts.build: pnpm run adapter-svelte:build && pnpm run adapter-web:build && pnpm run crafter:build && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.vc:bump: changeset version && pnpm --filter @ujl-framework/examples run version:sync && pnpm run format
scripts.vc:release: pnpm run npm:check-auth && pnpm run vc:preflight && changeset publish --ignore-scripts && pnpm run vc:verify-published && pnpm run vc:retag
scripts.vc:retag: git tag -l '@ujl-framework*' | xargs git tag -d && git tag v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version") && echo 'Tagged as v'$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")
scripts.npm:check-auth: npm whoami || (echo '\nError: Not logged in to npm. Run: npm login\n' && exit 1)
scripts.rtc: pnpm run rtc:lite && pnpm run test
scripts.rtc:lite: pnpm install && pnpm run format && pnpm run build && pnpm run lint && pnpm run check

author: mainzcript GbR
